name: Boston Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Navy beans, picked over and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beans in a large bowl and cover with enough water to submerge by two inches. Allow the beans to soak in a cool place for 6-12 hours.
2. Drain and rinse the beans.
3. Transfer the beans to a large pot and add enough fresh water to cover by two inches. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce the heat and simmer until tender, about 45 minutes to 1 1/2 hours, depending on the age of the beans.
4. Drain the beans and reserve the cooking liquid.
5. Arrange the beans in a 2-quart baking dish. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
6. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 6 minutes.
7. Stir the cooked onion into the beans along with the remaining ingredients. Pour in enough cooking liquid to barely cover the beans.
8. Cover the dish and bake at 300°F for 1-1 1/2 hours, or until all the liquid is absorbed.
9. Serve hot. Makes 3-4 main dish servings or 6-8 side-dish servings.
